result.text:
"Warrior" was conceived using the Scanner Art technique and digital collage, manipulating a guinea fowl feather to shape the silhouette of an armless male body, crowned by a crest that embodies both nobility and ancestral strength.
The absence of arms reinforces his transcendence, suggesting that his true power is spiritual in nature. A warrior who does not fight for conquest, but to honor ancestral memory.
https://t.co/0imWOKlWyP
